field_values.action_summary: Carter moves Dejah Thoris and Sola into opulent, ancient apartments overlooking the plaza. In a moment of intimacy and vulnerability, Carter reveals he is from Earth (Virginia). Dejah Thoris explains how Barsoomians observe Earth via telescopes but failed to recognize him due to his lack of typical Earth clothing.
field_values.emotional_beat: From relief/comfort to profound revelation and curiosity.
field_values.camera_intent: Establishing shots of ancient architecture and frescoes; Two-shot mediums for intimate conversation; Close-ups on Dejah Thoris regarding technology
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Transition from harsh exterior lighting to soft, luxurious interior lighting
Character placement within the new quarters relative to the plaza view
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH011_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from the harsh exterior world to a high-status, opulent interior setting. Use the architectural grandeur of the ancient quarters to frame a moment of profound character vulnerability where Carter reveals his Earthly origins.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- sola

## Required Environments
- ancient_opulent_quarters

## Continuity Constraints
- Transition from harsh exterior lighting to soft, luxurious interior lighting
- Character placement within the new quarters relative to the plaza view

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the new quarters
- BT002: Moment of relief and intimacy
- BT003: The revelation of Earth
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
